overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima depicting a samurai warrior traversing through fields of white pampas grass and dry prairie toward a traditional Japanese farmhouse, with a snow-capped mountain and distant tornado visible under stormy dusk skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: field of white pampas grass with distant mountain ridge

events.description: herd of horses runs across the distant ridge from left to right

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily through tall white pampas grass toward the distant mountain ridge

notable_agents.action: herd of horses galloping across the distant ridge line from left to right

entered.detail: large snow-capped mountain peak visible in the distance against stormy clouds
dense field of white flowering pampas grass swaying in the wind
tree-covered ridge line separating the field from the mountain base

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a dense field of white pampas grass under an overcast dusk sky. In the distance, a snow-capped mountain rises behind a forested ridge, while a herd of horses gallops across the horizon from left to right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with distant farmhouse and tornado

events.description: traditional Japanese farmhouse comes into view in the distance as white flowers transition to dry grass
tornado or whirlwind becomes visible in the distant right sky

agents.ego_description: samurai continues moving forward through transitioning terrain from white flowers to brown prairie grass

entered.detail: weathered wooden farmhouse with tiled roof appearing in the distance
dark tornado or whirlwind funnel visible against the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The landscape transitions from white flowers to dry brown grass as the samurai approaches a distant traditional farmhouse. A snow-capped mountain remains visible to the left while a tornado twists in the distant right sky, creating a dramatic storm atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching traditional farmhouse in open field

events.description: camera slows slightly as it approaches the farmhouse entrance area

agents.ego_description: samurai approaching the weathered wooden farmhouse with snow-capped mountain visible behind it

segments.scene_description: The samurai draws closer to the traditional wooden farmhouse, which now dominates the center of the frame with visible architectural details. The snow-capped mountain remains prominent to the left while the tornado and white flower fields fade from view behind the approaching perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wild prairie that gradually narrows its focus toward a solitary traditional farmhouse. It begins with a samurai walking through dense fields of white pampas grass under an overcast dusk sky, while a herd of horses gallops across a horizon framed by a distant snow-capped mountain. As the samurai advances, the landscape shifts from white flowers to dry brown grass and the atmosphere grows more dramatic with a tornado twisting in the distant right sky. The scene then closes in on the traditional wooden farmhouse as it begins to dominate the center of the frame, revealing intricate architectural details. Finally, the white flower fields and the storm fade into the background as the perspective settles on the destination with the mountain remaining prominent to the left.
